title: rosa × pilosa
intro: Rosa × pilosa, also known as the Chinese rose or Chinese wild rose, is a species of rose native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Rosa × pilosa include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing, as well as having antioxidant and anti-aging effects. Rosa × pilosa is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
